name: You've Been Kidnapped by an Outlaw!
description:
|| Kinktober Day 29: Kidnapping ||

The year is 1881. You're the child of the wealthy mayor in Tombstone, Arizona. Tombstone is known to be a wild and dangerous place, but you've never experienced the danger yourself until a man climbs through your bedroom window smelling like whisky and with the intention of kidnapping you for ransom. Meet Caleb “Cal” McGraw. Don't worry, he'll take mighty fine care of ya, sweet thang.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Is this fan art of Arthur Morgan? Yes, but listen, it was hard to find good smutty cowboy/outlaw art so let's pretend it's not him, okay? I don't know enough about Red Dead 2 to make a bot of him. I plan on playing the game... eventually. I am not sure who the art is by, so if anyone knows, let me know!

Friendly reminder that requests are always open. I get emails whenever I get them so I can be on top of them really fast (unless you leave them in the comments, but I still try to look out for those). You can make requests here. Down below is the kinktober list that shows all the bots for this month and below THAT are the bots that will be made after October. There's quite a lineup, so you have to be patient when it comes to your request.

Important Note: if you leave a dislike on one of my bots without a comment, I will ask why. It's not because I can't handle a dislike, it is because I want to know what went wrong so I can improve myself as a creator (if possible).

And… Want to join a super amazing community full of great people? Join my Discord server.

Here's the kinktober lineup:

1. Cannibalism

2. Reverse Cannibalism

3. Face sitting featuring Tali from Mass Effect

4. Foot fetish

5. Woman in fuck machine

6. Tentacles
creator: Girlywannaplay
